problem.title: Minimum Cost of Buying Candies With Discount

approaches.title: Sort candies descending and pay for the two most expensiveик
approaches.summary: Sort prices from highest to lowest, then pay for two candies in each group of three while taking the third as free. Revision 2 expresses the same greedy rule in

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses a stateful loop after descending sort to pay for two candies and skip every third candy.
Refactors the same greedy strategy into chunks of three and sums the first two prices in each chunk.
